title: Anti-tank weapons
description: Anti-tank weapons from different countries, works by renaming the crossbow
body:
3D resourse pack which changing texture of crossbow.

I recommend using fireworks as projectiles.

Versions prior to 1.21.5 require optifine or CIT resevn.

Rename crossbow on anvil to "RPG-7", "Bazooka M1", "Panzerfaust 60", "Panzerschreck 54" or "PIAT Mk I" and enjoy playing with the weapons from this pack.
